sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_polygons (id UInt32, polygon Array(Array(UInt8)));
SELECT id, round(polygonAreaSpherical(polygon), 14) AS area FROM geo_polygons;
UPDATE geo_polygons SET polygon = [[(3, 49), (4, 50), (4, 49), (3, 50), (3, 49)]] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, area FROM (SELECT id, round(polygonAreaSpherical(polygon), 14) AS area FROM geo_polygons) WHERE area > 0;
